name: Familiar-Possessed - Lyna
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>憑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>依</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>着</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ライナ
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Lyna the Light Charmer" you control and 1 face-up LIGHT monster you control to the GY. When Summoned this way: You can add 1 Spellcaster monster with 1500 DEF from your Deck to your hand, except "Familiar-Possessed - Lyna". If this card Special Summoned by its own effect attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Lyna the Light Charmer" you control and 1 face-up LIGHT monster you control to the GY. When Summoned this way: You can add 1 Spellcaster monster with 1500 DEF from your Deck to your hand, except "Familiar-Possessed - Lyna". action: Sends from field to Graveyard for Special Summon
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
